title: diploglottis australis var. muelleri
intro: Diploglottis australis var. muelleri, commonly known as the Tassel berry or Australian tassel berry, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The therapeutic actions of Diploglottis australis var. muelleri include wound healing, antimicrobial activity, and the reduction of inflammation. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

side_effects: Diploglottis australis var. muelleri can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues.
